description_long: This is a stylized AK-pattern rifle featuring a vibrant, multi-colored finish with blue, teal, and orange hues across its metal and polymer components. The rifle has a classic fixed stock, a curved detachable box magazine, and a standard-length barrel with iron sights. The handguard, pistol grip, and stock all display a matching decorative pattern, giving the weapon a unique, eye-catching appearance. The receiver and barrel assembly are metallic, likely steel, with visible details such as the charging handle and safety lever. The muzzle end appears to have a standard flash hider, and the overall build is robust, typical of urban combat rifles. The rifle's design is both functional and visually striking, making it stand out in an urban environment.
description: A stylized AK-pattern rifle with a vibrant blue and orange finish, fixed stock, curved magazine, and standard barrel with iron sights. The weapon features decorative patterns on the stock and grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, curved magazine, and decorative patterns.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the rifle, with similar features and decorative finish.
